stemHtml: After departure as a special VFR flight, when approaching the control zone boundary you...

options.a: will be cleared to leave the control zone in accordance with established procedures.
options.b: can automatically contact the next ATC unit.
options.c: should report passing the control zone boundary to ATC and include the phrase “CANCELLING SPECIAL VFR”.
options.d: should broadcast a position report and the in-flight visibility on the current frequency.
